title: Latch
why_this_song: Latch by Disclosure (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Now I got you in my space
I won't let go of you
Got you shackled in my embrace
When the rest of me is down
You, you enchant me, even when you're not around
If there are boundaries, I will try to knock them down

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "won't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "won't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "latching" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "latching" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Got you shackled in my embrace

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Latch" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Latch" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Latch", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Latch", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Latch" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Latch" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Latch" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Latch"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.
